<tabber>
|-|Koryeo=
{| class="mw-collapsible fandom-table"
!Image
!Name
!Snail HP
!Snail ATK
!Snail DEF
!Snail RUSH
!Special Stats
!Source
|-
|[[File:11.png]]
|Warmonger's Gun
File 100
| +600
| +180
| +60
| +180
|In Koryeo, Snail ATK +120
In Koryeo, Snail RUSH +120

In Koryeo, DMG +12%

In Koryeo, INTEL gained+12%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:10.png]]
|Virgo Tech
File 101
| +800
| +80
| +80
| +80
|In Koryeo, Snail ATK +96
In Koryeo, Snail RUSH +96
|Defeat Koryeo Commissioner
|-
|[[File:9.png]]
|Jung-geun's Gun
File 102
| +400
| +120
| +40
| +120
|In Koryeo, DMG +8%
In Koryeo, INTEL gained +8%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:8.png]]
|Gas Mask
File 103
| +400
| +40
| +40
| +40
|In Koryeo Exploration, DMG +4%
In Koryeo, INTEL gained +4%
|Home Chest
|-
|[[File:7.png]]
|Golden Assault Rifle
File 104
| +200
| +60
| +20
| +60
|In Koryeo, DMG +4%
In Koryeo, INTEL gained +4%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:6.png]]
|Bulletproof Vest
File 105
| +200
| +20
| +20
| +20
|In Koryeo, DMG +2%
In Koryeo, INTEL gained +2%
|Card Exchange
|-
|[[File:5.png]]
|Assault Rifle Model 98
File 106
| +100
| +30
| +10
| +30
|In Koryeo, DMG +2%
In Koryeo, INTEL gained +2%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:4.png]]
|Motorbike Helmet
File 107
| +300
| +0
| +10
| +0
|In Koryeo, DMG +2%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:3.png]]
|Switchblade
File 108
| +0
| +30
| +0
| +10
|In Koryeo, INTEL gained +2%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:1.png]]
|Ice Skates
File 109
| +0
| +20
| +0
| +0
|In Koryeo, INTEL gained +1%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:2.png]]
|Crowbar
File 110
| +0
| +20
| +0
| +0
|None
|Card Redemption
|}
|-|Yamoto=
{| class="mw-collapsible fandom-table"
!Image
!Name
!Snail HP
!Snail ATK
!Snail DEF
!Snail RUSH
!Special Stats
!Source
|-
|[[File:14.png]]
|Sword Futsuno
File 200
| +600
| +180
| +60
| +180
|In Yamoto, Snail ATK +120
In Yamoto, Snail RUSH +120

In Yamoto, Dmg +12%

In Yamoto, INTEL gained +12%
|
|-
|[[File:13.png]]
|Genji Armor
File 201
| +800
| +80
| +80
| +80
|In Yamoto, Snail ATK +96
In Yamoto, Snail DEF +96
|
|-
|[[File:9..png]]
|Blade Murasame
File 202
| +400
| +120
| +40
| +120
|In Yamoto, DMG +8%
In Yamoto, INTEL gained +8%
|
|-
|[[File:12.png]]
|Genji Shield
File 203
| +400
| +40
| +40
| +40
|In Yamoto, Snail ATK +48
In Yamoto, Snail DEF +48
|
|-
|[[File:11..png]]
|Genji Helmet
File 204
| +600
| +20
| +60
| +20
|In Yamoto,  Snail DEF +48
|
|-
|[[File:10..png]]
|Genji Gloves
File 205
| +200
| +60
| +20
| +60
|In Yamoto, Snail ATK +48
|
|-
|[[File:8..png]]
|Blade Muramasa
File 206
| +200
| +60
| +20
| +60
|In Yamoto, DMG +4%

In Yamoto, INTEL gained +4%
|
|-
|[[File:7..png]]
|Royal Banner
File 207
| +600
| +20
| +60
| +20
|In Yamoto, DMG +4%
In Yamoto, INTEL gained +4%
|
|-
|[[File:6..png]]
|Servant Spirit Pendant
File 208
| +200
| +20
| +20
| +20
|In Yamoto, DMG +2%

In Yamoto, INTEL gained +2%
|
|-
|[[File:5..png]]
|Crimson Haori Jacket
File 209
| +300
| +10
| +30
| +10
|In Yamoto, DMG +2%

In Yamoto, INTEL gained +2%
|
|-
|[[File:4..png]]
|Ninjutsu Armband
File 210
| +0
| +30
| +0
| +0
|In Yamoto, DMG +2%
|
|-
|[[File:3..png]]
|Golden Yamoto Armor
File 211
| +300
| +0
| +10
| +0
|In Yamoto, INTEL gained +2%
|
|-
|[[File:2..png]]
|Royal Underwear
File 212
| +200
| +0
| +0
| +0
|In Yamoto, INTEL gained +1%
|
|-
|[[File:1..png]]
|Light Yamoto Armor
File 213
| +0
| +0
| +20
| +0
|None
|
|}
|-|Cathay=
{| class="mw-collapsible fandom-table"
!Image
!Name
!Snail HP
!Snail ATK
!Snail DEF
!Snail RUSH
!Special Stats
!Source
|-
|[[File:11,.png]]
|Sky Piercer
File 300

| +600
| +180
| +60
| +180
|In Cathay, Snail ATK +120
In Cathay, Snail RUSH +120

In Cathay, DMG +12%

In Cathay, INTEL gained +12%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:10,.png]]
|Conqueror Spear
| +800
| +80
| +80
| +80
|In Cathay, Snail ATK +96
In Cathay, Snail RUSH +96
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:9,.png]]
|Couple Swords
| +400
| +120
| +40
| +120
|In Cathay, DMG +8%
In Cathay, INTEL gained +8%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:8,.png]]
|Silver Lion
| +400
| +40
| +40
| +40
|In Cathay, DMG +4%
In Cathay, INTEL gained +4%
|Card Redemption 
|-
|[[File:7,.png]]
|7-Star Blade
| +200
| +60
| +20
| +60
|In Cathay, DMG +4%

In Cathay, INTEL gained +4%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:6,.png]]
|Rainbow Tassle
| +200
| +20
| +20
| +20
|In Cathay, DMG +2%
In Cathay, INTEL gained +2%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:5,.png]]
|Ancient Blade
| +100
| +300
| +10
| +30
|In Cathay, DMG +2%

In Cathay, INTEL gained +2%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:4,.png]]
|Heart-Protection Mirror
| +300
| +0
| +10
| +0
|In Cathay, DMG +2%
| Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:3,.png]]
|Wu Scimitar
| +0
| +30
| +0
| +10
|In Cathay, INTEL gained +2%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:2,.png]]
|Iron Helmet
| +0
| +0
| +20
| +0
|In Cathay, INTEL gained +1%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:1,.png]]
|Podao
| +0
| +20
| +0
| +0
|None
|Card Redemption
|}
|-|Murika=
{| class="mw-collapsible fandom-table"
!Image
!Name
!Snail HP
!Snail ATK
!Snail DEF
!Snail RUSH

!Special Stats
!Source
|-
|[[File:14-.png]]
|Bullet Storm
| +600
| +180
| +60
| +180
|In Murika, Snail ATK +120
In Murika, Snail RUSH +120

In Murika, DMG +12%

In Murika, INTEL gained +12%
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:13-.png]]
|Indv. Power Armor
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:9-.png]]
|Indv. High Explosive Rifle
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:12-.png]]
|Mechanical Exoskeleton
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:11-.png]]
|Powered Glove 
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:10-.png]]
|Holographic Tactical Glasses
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:8-.png]]
|Long Range Scope
| +600
| +20
| +60
| +20
|In Murika, DMG +4%
In Murika, INTEL gained +4%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:7-.png]]
|M4 Carbine
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:6-.png]]
|PASGT Helmet
| +200
| +20
| +20
| +20
|In Murika, DMG +2%
In Murika, INTEL gained +2%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:5-.png]]
|Springfield Rifle
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
|[[File:4-.png]]
|Tactical Vest
| +300
| +0
| +10
| +0
|In Murika, DMG +2%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:3-.png]]
|Colt Revolver
|
|
|
|
|
|Crafting
|-
| [[File:2-.png]]
|Tactical Boots
| +0
| +0
| +0
| +20
| In Murika, INTEL gained +1%
|Card Redemption
|-
|[[File:1-.png]]
|Smoothbore
| +0
| +20
| +0
| +0
|None
|Card Redemption
|}
|-|Britland=
{| class="fandom-table"
!Image
!Name
!Snail HP
!Snail ATK
!Snail DEF
!Snail RUSH
!Special Stats
!Source
|-
|
|Crown of Eternal Daylight
| +600
| +180
| +60
| +180
|In Britland, Snail ATK +150
In Britland, Snail RUSH +150
In Britland, DMG +12%
In Britland, INTEL gained +12%
In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +12%
|Crafting
|-
|
|Windsor's Cape
| +800
| +80
| +80
| +80
|In Britland, Snail ATK +120
In Britland, Snail RUSH +120
|Card Redemption
|-
|
|Lion's Crown
| +400
| +120
| +40
| +120
|In Britland, DMG +8%
In Britland, INTEL gained +8%

In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +8%
|Crafting
|-
|
|Britland Crown
| +400
| +40
| +40
| +40
|In Britland, DMG +4%
In Britland, INTEL gained +4%

In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +4%
|Card Redemption
|-
|
|Shotgun Umbrella
| +200
| +60
| +20
| +60
|In Britland, DMG +4%
In Britland, INTEL gained +4%

In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +4%
|Crafting
|-
|
|Tuxedo
| +200
| +20
| +20
| +20
|In Britland, DMG +2%
In Britland, INTEL gained +2%

In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +2%
|Card Redemption
|-
|
|Sword Cane
| +100
| +30
| +10
| +30
| In Britland, DMG +2%
In Britland, INTEL gained +2%

In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +2%
|Crafting
|-
|
|Royal Guard Bearskin Hat

| +300
| +0
| +10
| +0
|In Britland, DMG +2%
In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +1%
|Card Redemption
|-
|
|Lee Enfield Rifle 
| +0
| +30
| +0
| +10
|In Britland, INTEL gained +2%
In Britland, fleet cannon DMG +1%
|Crafting
|-
|
|Gentleman's Staff
| +0
| +0
| +20
| +0
|In Britland, INTEL gained +1%
|Card Redemption
|-
|
|Top Hat
| +0
| +20
| +0
| +0
|None
|Card Redemption
|}
</tabber>
[[Category:Gears]]
[[Category:Koryeo Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Yamato Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Cathay Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
